action.reasoning: Observation: Best AUC still 0.7547 (h=256/l=2/d=0.3 from iter2); iter4 larger onehot-DKT reached only 0.7526 test (val peak 0.7533), loss converged well to ~0.52 but no further gains. Analysis: One-hot inputs are high-dim/sparse; switching to learned embedding(2*num_skills, 64) for interactions (skill+correct flag) reduces params, enables better representations, standard DKT improvement. Higher hidden=512/layers=2 feasible. Decision: Update model/train/predict for Embedded-DKT, set h=512/l=2/d=0.3/embed=64/epochs=40/lr=5e-4/scheduler(patience=5), run training then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
